eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: New Mexico; at 1:19 AM on JUN 8, 2026 Effective until 2:19 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: AMBER ALERT: Albuquerque PD seeks 8-year-old Calliope Godwin, abducted 06/07/2026 at about 10:22 AM near 200 Valencia St SE by Cavon Godwin. Calliope is an African American female, brown eyes, black hair, 4'3", 90 lbs, wearing purple sweats. Cavon is an African American male, 5'7", 160lbs, black hair, brown eyes, and may be driving a black Mercedes sedan with a white license plate. If seen, call 911 or APD Missing Persons Unit at 505-242-2677. Visit fb.com/abqpolice for flyer
